```text
   149→const tokenizeLoadingText = (text: string, locale: string) => {
   150→  if (locale === 'zh') {
   151→    return Array.from(text).map((value, index) => ({
   152→      key: `${index}-${value}`,
   153→      value,
   154→      delay: index * 0.03,
   155→      initial: { opacity: 0, y: 4, filter: 'blur(2px)' },
   156→      animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: 'blur(0px)' },
   157→    }))
   158→  }
   159→
   160→  if (locale === 'ja') {
   161→    return text.split(/\u3000+/).map((value, index, arr) => ({
   162→      key: `${index}-${value}`,
   163→      value: index === arr.length - 1 ? value : `${value}\u3000`,
   164→      delay: index * 0.11,
   165→      initial: { opacity: 0, y: 3, filter: 'blur(2px)' },
   166→      animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: 'blur(0px)' },
   167→    }))
   168→  }
   169→
   170→  return (text.match(/\S+\s*/g) ?? [text]).map((value, index) => ({
   171→    key: `${index}-${value}`,
   172→    value,
   173→    delay: index * 0.06,
   174→    initial: { opacity: 0.15, x: 3, filter: 'blur(2px)' },
   175→    animate: { opacity: 1, x: 0, filter: 'blur(0px)' },
   176→  }))
   177→}
   178→
   179→const AnimatedLoadingText = ({ locale, text }: AnimatedLoadingTextProps) => {
   180→  const tokens = tokenizeLoadingText(text, locale)
   181→
   182→  return (
   183→    <m.span
   184→      animate={{ opacity: [0.9, 1, 0.94] }}
   185→      className="mt-6 block max-w-[32rem] text-center text-sm leading-7 text-neutral-11/80"
   186→      transition={{
   187→        delay: 0.6,
   188→        duration: 2.4,
   189→        ease: 'easeInOut',
   190→        repeat: Infinity,
   191→        repeatType: 'mirror',
   192→      }}
   193→    >
   194→      {tokens.map((token) => (
   195→        <m.span
   196→          animate={token.animate}
   197→          className="inline-block whitespace-pre"
   198→          initial={token.initial}
   199→          key={token.key}
   200→          transition={{
   201→            duration: 0.36,
   202→            ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1],
   203→            delay: token.delay,
   204→          }}
   205→        >
   206→          {token.value}
   207→        </m.span>
   208→      ))}
   209→    </m.span>
   210→  )
   211→}
   212→
   213→export const Loading: Component<LoadingProps> = ({
   214→  loadingText,
   215→  className,
   216→  useDefaultLoadingText = false,
   217→}) => {
   218→  const locale = useLocale()
   219→  const t = useTranslations('common')
   220→  const id = useId()
   221→  const defaultLoadingText = pickLoadingText(t.raw('loading_default'), id)
   222→  const nextLoadingText = useDefaultLoadingText
   223→    ? defaultLoadingText
   224→    : loadingText
   225→  return (
   226→    <div
   227→      data-hide-print
   228→      className={clsxm('my-20 flex flex-col center', className)}
   229→    >
   230→      <InkDropLoadingMark />
   231→      {!!nextLoadingText && (
   232→        <AnimatedLoadingText locale={locale} text={nextLoadingText} />
   233→      )}
   234→    </div>
   235→  )
   236→}
   237→
   238→export const FullPageLoading = () => (
   239→  <Loading useDefaultLoadingText className="h-[calc(100vh-6.5rem-10rem)]" />
   240→)
   241→
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-13 14:28:38Z)**_

## 构思：墨水滴纸效果 Loading

### 现状分析

当前 `InkDropLoadingMark` 已有初步墨滴造型——六层 `m.span` 叠加，以 `borderRadius` 动画模拟有机 blob 形态，配合 blur 与 opacity 呼吸。效果偏抽象，未真正呈现「墨滴纸上」之物理质感。

### 设计方向

**核心意象**：墨滴落于和纸，墨渍沿纤维渗透扩散——契合「Shiroi（白い）」之白纸主题。

#### 方向 A：SVG filter 墨渍扩散

利用 SVG `<feTurbulence>` + `<feDisplacementMap>` 模拟纸纤维对墨水的不规则吸附：

- 中心墨点从 `scale(0)` 扩展至 `scale(1)`，边缘经 displacement 扭曲成有机形
- `feTurbulence` 的 `baseFrequency` 随时间微变，呈现墨渍缓慢渗透感
- 可叠加 `feGaussianBlur` 模拟墨水晕染边缘
- **优**：纯 CSS/SVG，性能佳，效果真实
- **劣**：SVG filter 动画需精调，移动端性能需验证

#### 方向 B：Canvas 粒子墨渍

用 `<canvas>` 绘制墨滴粒子扩散：

- 中心释放粒子，沿 Perlin noise 场扩散，模拟纤维走向
- 粒子浓度递减，边缘自然淡出
- **优**：效果最真实，可控性强
- **劣**：引入 Canvas 逻辑，复杂度高，与现有 motion 体系不一致

#### 方向 C：多层 CSS 渐变 + motion（渐进增强现有方案）

在现有 `m.span` 层叠基础上强化：

- 主墨点用 `radial-gradient` 模拟浓淡过渡，中心浓、边缘淡
- 增加 2-3 个「飞溅小墨点」，随机偏移出现
- 背景加微妙纸纹 noise texture（项目已有 noise 生成机制）
- 用 `borderRadius` 动画的关键帧更贴近真实墨渍形态
- **优**：改动最小，沿用 motion 体系
- **劣**：物理真实感有限

#### 方向 D：SVG path 墨滴动画

预制数帧墨渍 SVG path，用 motion 在帧间 morphing：

- 3-4 个手绘墨渍轮廓 path，`d` 属性插值过渡
- 内部填充用 radial-gradient 模拟浓淡
- 可加一个「滴落」入场动画——墨滴从上方坠落，触纸瞬间扩散
- **优**：视觉精确可控，性能好
- **劣**：需设计/手绘 SVG path

---

### 吾之推荐

**方向 A（SVG filter）为首选**。理由：

1. 纯声明式，与现有 React + motion 架构一致
2. SVG filter 可用 CSS animation 驱动，无需额外 runtime
3. `feTurbulence` 天然适合模拟纸纤维不规则性
4. 暗色模式下反转为白墨/深纸亦简洁
5. 性能优于 Canvas，兼容性佳

可与 **方向 D** 结合——用 SVG path 定义墨滴轮廓，filter 处理边缘渗透效果。

---

君意如何？确定方向后吾即出实现方案。

---

```tsx
'use client'

import { m, AnimatePresence } from 'motion/react'
import { useState } from 'react'

// ─── Approach A: SVG Filter Ink Diffusion ───
const InkFilterId = 'ink-turbulence'
const ApproachA = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
    <svg width="0" height="0" className="absolute">
      <defs>
        <filter id={InkFilterId} x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
          <feTurbulence
            type="fractalNoise"
            baseFrequency="0.04"
            numOctaves="4"
            seed="2"
            result="noise"
          >
            <animate
              attributeName="baseFrequency"
              values="0.04;0.06;0.04"
              dur="4s"
              repeatCount="indefinite"
            />
          </feTurbulence>
          <feDisplacementMap
            in="SourceGraphic"
            in2="noise"
            scale="18"
            xChannelSelector="R"
            yChannelSelector="G"
          >
            <animate
              attributeName="scale"
              values="12;22;16"
              dur="3s"
              repeatCount="indefinite"
            />
          </feDisplacementMap>
          <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="0.6" />
        </filter>
      </defs>
    </svg>
    <m.div
      className="relative flex items-center justify-center"
      style={{ width: 80, height: 80 }}
    >
      <m.div
        className="rounded-full bg-neutral-900 dark:bg-neutral-100"
        style={{
          width: 28,
          height: 28,
          filter: `url(#${InkFilterId})`,
        }}
        animate={{
          scale: [0.7, 1.1, 0.9, 1],
          opacity: [0.6, 0.9, 0.75, 0.85],
        }}
        transition={{
          duration: 3,
          ease: 'easeInOut',
          repeat: Infinity,
        }}
      />
      {/* Satellite drops */}
      {[
        { x: 18, y: -14, size: 5, delay: 0.4 },
        { x: -16, y: 12, size: 4, delay: 0.8 },
        { x: 12, y: 16, size: 3, delay: 1.2 },
      ].map((dot, i) => (
        <m.div
          key={i}
          className="absolute rounded-full bg-neutral-900/60 dark:bg-neutral-100/60"
          style={{
            width: dot.size,
            height: dot.size,
            left: `calc(50% + ${dot.x}px)`,
            top: `calc(50% + ${dot.y}px)`,
            filter: `url(#${InkFilterId})`,
          }}
          animate={{
            scale: [0, 1.2, 0.8, 1],
            opacity: [0, 0.7, 0.4, 0.5],
          }}
          transition={{
            duration: 3,
            delay: dot.delay,
            ease: 'easeInOut',
            repeat: Infinity,
          }}
        />
      ))}
    </m.div>
  </div>
)

// ─── Approach B: Canvas Particle Ink ───
import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react'

const ApproachB = () => {
  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    if (!ctx) return

    const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1
    const size = 80
    canvas.width = size * dpr
    canvas.height = size * dpr
    ctx.scale(dpr, dpr)

    const particles: {
      x: number
      y: number
      vx: number
      vy: number
      life: number
      maxLife: number
      size: number
    }[] = []

    const isDark = document.documentElement.classList.contains('dark')
    const inkColor = isDark ? '255,255,255' : '15,23,42'

    let frame: number
    const cx = size / 2
    const cy = size / 2

    const spawn = () => {
      const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2
      const speed = 0.3 + Math.random() * 0.8
      particles.push({
        x: cx + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 4,
        y: cy + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 4,
        vx: Math.cos(angle) * speed,
        vy: Math.sin(angle) * speed,
        life: 0,
        maxLife: 60 + Math.random() * 80,
        size: 1.5 + Math.random() * 2.5,
      })
    }

    const tick = () => {
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, size, size)

      if (particles.length < 120 && Math.random() < 0.4) {
        spawn()
        spawn()
      }

      for (let i = particles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        const p = particles[i]
        p.life++
        if (p.life > p.maxLife) {
          particles.splice(i, 1)
          continue
        }

        const progress = p.life / p.maxLife
        // Perlin-like noise approximation with sin
        p.vx += Math.sin(p.y * 0.08 + p.life * 0.02) * 0.06
        p.vy += Math.cos(p.x * 0.08 + p.life * 0.02) * 0.06
        p.vx *= 0.98
        p.vy *= 0.98
        p.x += p.vx
        p.y += p.vy

        const alpha = progress < 0.3
          ? progress / 0.3
          : 1 - (progress - 0.3) / 0.7
        ctx.beginPath()
        ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.size * (0.6 + progress * 0.4), 0, Math.PI * 2)
        ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${inkColor},${alpha * 0.6})`
        ctx.fill()
      }

      // Central ink core
      const t = Date.now() * 0.001
      const coreSize = 6 + Math.sin(t * 1.5) * 2
      const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, 0, cx, cy, coreSize)
      gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgba(${inkColor},0.85)`)
      gradient.addColorStop(0.6, `rgba(${inkColor},0.3)`)
      gradient.addColorStop(1, `rgba(${inkColor},0)`)
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(cx, cy, coreSize, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fillStyle = gradient
      ctx.fill()

      frame = requestAnimationFrame(tick)
    }

    tick()
    return () => cancelAnimationFrame(frame)
  }, [])

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
      <canvas
        ref={canvasRef}
        style={{ width: 80, height: 80 }}
      />
    </div>
  )
}

// ─── Approach C: Multi-layer CSS + Motion (enhanced current) ───
const ApproachC = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
    <m.div
      className="relative"
      style={{ width: 80, height: 80 }}
      animate={{ opacity: [0.85, 1, 0.9] }}
      transition={{ duration: 2.6, ease: 'easeInOut', repeat: Infinity }}
    >
      {/* Paper texture background */}
      <div
        className="absolute inset-0 rounded-lg opacity-[0.03] dark:opacity-[0.05]"
        style={{
          backgroundImage: `url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")`,
          backgroundSize: '100px 100px',
        }}
      />
      {/* Shadow / bleed layer */}
      <m.div
        className="absolute bg-neutral-950/10 blur-[10px] dark:bg-neutral-50/8"
        style={{ left: 24, top: 26, width: 32, height: 30 }}
        animate={{
          scale: [0.95, 1.2, 1.05],
          opacity: [0.1, 0.25, 0.15],
          borderRadius: [
            '58% 42% 46% 54% / 44% 56% 48% 52%',
            '50% 50% 40% 60% / 50% 40% 60% 50%',
            '62% 38% 55% 45% / 43% 57% 46% 54%',
          ],
        }}
        transition={{ duration: 2.6, ease: 'easeInOut', repeat: Infinity }}
      />
      {/* Main ink body with radial gradient */}
      <m.div
        className="absolute"
        style={{
          left: 28,
          top: 28,
          width: 24,
          height: 22,
          background: 'radial-gradient(ellipse at 45% 40%, rgb(15 23 42 / 0.88) 0%, rgb(15 23 42 / 0.45) 50%, rgb(15 23 42 / 0.08) 100%)',
        }}
        animate={{
          scaleX: [0.94, 1.08, 1],
          scaleY: [1.06, 0.96, 1.02],
          rotate: [-8, -2, -6],
          borderRadius: [
            '62% 38% 52% 48% / 42% 58% 44% 56%',
            '48% 52% 40% 60% / 54% 36% 64% 46%',
            '58% 42% 56% 44% / 40% 60% 46% 54%',
          ],
        }}
        transition={{ duration: 2.6, ease: [0.4, 0, 0.2, 1], repeat: Infinity }}
      />
      {/* Highlight / wet sheen */}
      <m.div
        className="absolute bg-white/25 mix-blend-screen blur-[0.6px] dark:bg-white/15"
        style={{ left: 33, top: 32, width: 8, height: 6 }}
        animate={{
          opacity: [0.06, 0.2, 0.1],
          rotate: [-14, -8, -12],
          borderRadius: [
            '65% 35% 58% 42% / 45% 55% 40% 60%',
            '52% 48% 34% 66% / 60% 35% 65% 40%',
            '60% 40% 55% 45% / 42% 58% 47% 53%',
          ],
        }}
        transition={{ duration: 2.6, ease: 'easeInOut', repeat: Infinity }}
      />
      {/* Splash droplets */}
      {[
        { x: 52, y: 48, s: 5 },
        { x: 18, y: 46, s: 7, w: 8 },
        { x: 50, y: 28, s: 5, w: 7 },
      ].map((d, i) => (
        <m.div
          key={i}
          className="absolute rounded-full bg-neutral-950/20 blur-[1.5px] dark:bg-neutral-100/18"
          style={{ left: d.x, top: d.y, width: d.w ?? d.s, height: d.s }}
          animate={{
            opacity: [0.08, 0.2, 0.12],
            scale: [0.94, 1.1, 1],
          }}
          transition={{
            duration: 2.6,
            delay: i * 0.3,
            ease: 'easeInOut',
            repeat: Infinity,
          }}
        />
      ))}
    </m.div>
  </div>
)

// ─── Approach D: SVG Path Morphing ───
const inkPaths = [
  'M40 28c-6 2-12 8-13 14-1 4 1 8 3 11 3 4 8 6 13 5 4-1 7-4 9-8 2-5 1-11-3-15-3-3-6-6-9-7z',
  'M38 26c-5 3-10 10-10 16 0 5 3 9 7 11 4 3 9 3 13 1 5-2 8-6 9-11 1-6-2-12-7-15-3-2-8-4-12-2z',
  'M42 27c-7 1-14 7-15 14-1 5 1 10 5 13 4 3 9 4 14 2 4-2 7-5 8-10 1-5-1-11-4-14-3-3-5-5-8-5z',
]

const splashPaths = [
  ['M18 42c-2 1-3 3-2 4 1 2 3 1 4 0s1-3 0-4-2-1-2 0z', 'M56 34c-1-2-3-2-4 0s0 3 1 4c2 1 3 0 3-2v-2z'],
  ['M16 40c-1 2-1 4 1 4s3-1 3-3-1-3-2-3-1 1-2 2z', 'M58 32c0-2-2-3-3-2-2 1-2 3-1 4 1 2 3 1 4-1v-1z'],
  ['M19 44c-2 0-3 2-2 4 1 1 3 1 4-1 0-1 0-3-2-3z', 'M55 36c-1-1-3-1-4 1 0 1 0 3 2 3 1 1 3-1 3-3l-1-1z'],
]

const ApproachD = () => (
  <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
    <m.div
      className="relative"
      style={{ width: 80, height: 80 }}
    >
      <svg viewBox="0 0 80 80" width="80" height="80">
        {/* Drop-fall animation */}
        <m.circle
          cx="40"
          cy="10"
          r="3"
          className="fill-neutral-900 dark:fill-neutral-100"
          animate={{
            cy: [6, 28, 28],
            r: [3, 3, 0],
            opacity: [1, 1, 0],
          }}
          transition={{
            duration: 2.4,
            times: [0, 0.35, 0.45],
            ease: 'easeIn',
            repeat: Infinity,
            repeatDelay: 0.8,
          }}
        />
        {/* Main ink blot - path morphing */}
        <m.path
          className="fill-neutral-900/80 dark:fill-neutral-100/80"
          animate={{
            d: inkPaths,
            opacity: [0, 0.85, 0.85, 0.7, 0],
          }}
          transition={{
            duration: 3.2,
            times: [0, 0.35, 0.6, 0.85, 1],
            ease: 'easeInOut',
            repeat: Infinity,
            repeatDelay: 0,
          }}
        />
        {/* Splash drops - path morphing */}
        {[0, 1].map((si) => (
          <m.path
            key={si}
            className="fill-neutral-900/50 dark:fill-neutral-100/50"
            animate={{
              d: splashPaths.map((frame) => frame[si]),
              opacity: [0, 0, 0.6, 0.5, 0],
            }}
            transition={{
              duration: 3.2,
              times: [0, 0.3, 0.45, 0.75, 1],
              ease: 'easeInOut',
              repeat: Infinity,
              repeatDelay: 0,
            }}
          />
        ))}
      </svg>
    </m.div>
  </div>
)

// ─── Demo Page ───
const approaches = [
  {
    id: 'A',
    title: 'SVG Filter 墨渍扩散',
    desc: 'feTurbulence + feDisplacementMap 模拟纸纤维不规则吸附',
    component: ApproachA,
  },
  {
    id: 'B',
    title: 'Canvas 粒子墨渍',
    desc: '粒子沿 noise 场扩散，模拟墨水在纤维中渗透',
    component: ApproachB,
  },
  {
    id: 'C',
    title: '多层 CSS + Motion',
    desc: '渐进增强现有方案，radial-gradient 浓淡 + 纸纹 noise',
    component: ApproachC,
  },
  {
    id: 'D',
    title: 'SVG Path Morphing',
    desc: '墨滴坠落触纸，path d 属性插值扩散',
    component: ApproachD,
  },
]

export default function LoadingDemoPage() {
  const [darkPreview, setDarkPreview] = useState(false)

  return (
    <div className="mx-auto max-w-4xl px-6 py-16">
      <h1 className="mb-2 text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight">
        Loading Mockup — 墨水滴纸效果
      </h1>
      <p className="mb-10 text-sm text-neutral-500">
        四种设计方向对比
      </p>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-8">
        {approaches.map(({ id, title, desc, component: Comp }) => (
          <div
            key={id}
            className="flex flex-col items-center rounded-xl border border-neutral-200 bg-white/60 p-8 shadow-sm backdrop-blur dark:border-neutral-800 dark:bg-neutral-900/60"
          >
            <div className="mb-2 text-xs font-medium tracking-wider text-neutral-400">
              方案 {id}
            </div>
            <div className="mb-1 text-sm font-semibold">{title}</div>
            <div className="mb-6 text-center text-xs text-neutral-500">
              {desc}
            </div>
            <div className="flex h-[120px] w-full items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-neutral-50 dark:bg-neutral-950/40">
              <Comp />
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-13 14:35:30Z)**_

GIF 已导出。现总结四方案效果对比：

---

## 四方案实际效果

**方案 A — SVG Filter 墨渍扩散** ：效果最佳。`feTurbulence` 产生的不规则边缘酷似真实墨渍渗入纸纤维，形态有机且持续微变。亮/暗模式均表现良好。

**方案 B — Canvas 粒子墨渍** ：粒子散射效果呈现墨水飞溅感，有「活」的质感。然亮色下可见，暗色下几近不可见——需调 alpha 及色值。且 Canvas 与现有 motion 体系异质。

**方案 C — 多层 CSS + Motion** ：与现有组件最相似，radial-gradient 产生浓淡过渡。效果偏保守，墨渍感不强，更像一颗模糊球体。

**方案 D — SVG Path Morphing** ：墨滴坠落 + 扩散的叙事感最强。可见小圆从上方坠落，触底后 path morphing 扩散成墨渍。但 opacity 动画使其间歇性消失，节奏需调。

---

**综合评价**：A > D > B > C。方案 A 质感最真实且实现最纯粹，D 有叙事性但需打磨节奏，B 效果独特但架构不统一，C 偏平庸。

君意如何？可选定方向后精调，或组合 A+D（filter 边缘 + 坠落叙事）。

---

```text
    68→            '62% 38% 52% 48% / 42% 58% 44% 56%',
    69→            '48% 52% 40% 60% / 54% 36% 64% 46%',
    70→            '58% 42% 56% 44% / 40% 60% 46% 54%',
    71→          ],
    72→        }}
    73→        transition={{
    74→          duration: 2.6,
    75→          ease: [0.4, 0, 0.2, 1],
    76→          repeat: Infinity,
    77→        }}
    78→      />
    79→      <m.span
    80→        className="absolute left-[12px] top-[10px] h-[5px] w-[4px] bg-white/30 mix-blend-screen blur-[0.8px] dark:bg-white/20"
    81→        animate={{
    82→          opacity: [0.08, 0.18, 0.1],
    83→          rotate: [-16, -10, -12],
    84→          borderRadius: [
    85→            '65% 35% 58% 42% / 45% 55% 40% 60%',
    86→            '52% 48% 34% 66% / 60% 35% 65% 40%',
    87→            '60% 40% 55% 45% / 42% 58% 47% 53%',
    88→          ],
    89→        }}
    90→        transition={{
    91→          duration: 2.6,
    92→          ease: 'easeInOut',
    93→          repeat: Infinity,
    94→        }}
    95→      />
    96→      <m.span
    97→        className="absolute left-[18px] top-[19px] size-[4px] rounded-full bg-neutral-950/24 blur-[1.5px] dark:bg-neutral-100/22"
    98→        animate={{
    99→          opacity: [0.12, 0.2, 0.14],
   100→          scale: [0.96, 1.1, 1],
   101→        }}
   102→        transition={{
   103→          duration: 2.6,
   104→          ease: 'easeInOut',
   105→          repeat: Infinity,
   106→        }}
   107→      />
   108→      <m.span
   109→        className="absolute left-[3px] top-[17px] h-[5px] w-[7px] bg-neutral-950/12 blur-[2.4px] dark:bg-neutral-100/10"
   110→        animate={{
   111→          opacity: [0.08, 0.16, 0.1],
   112→          scaleX: [0.94, 1.08, 1],
   113→          scaleY: [0.98, 1.04, 1],
   114→          rotate: [-24, -18, -22],
   115→          borderRadius: [
   116→            '70% 30% 58% 42% / 46% 54% 38% 62%',
   117→            '54% 46% 36% 64% / 58% 34% 66% 42%',
   118→            '68% 32% 55% 45% / 44% 56% 41% 59%',
   119→          ],
   120→        }}
   121→        transition={{
   122→          duration: 2.6,
   123→          ease: 'easeInOut',
   124→          repeat: Infinity,
   125→        }}
   126→      />
   127→      <m.span
   128→        className="absolute left-[21px] top-[6px] h-[4px] w-[6px] bg-neutral-950/10 blur-[2px] dark:bg-neutral-100/9"
   129→        animate={{
   130→          opacity: [0.06, 0.13, 0.08],
   131→          scale: [0.96, 1.08, 1],
   132→          rotate: [18, 24, 20],
   133→          borderRadius: [
   134→            '60% 40% 66% 34% / 38% 62% 44% 56%',
   135→            '46% 54% 30% 70% / 56% 36% 64% 44%',
   136→            '64% 36% 58% 42% / 42% 58% 48% 52%',
   137→          ],
   138→        }}
   139→        transition={{
   140→          duration: 2.6,
   141→          ease: 'easeInOut',
   142→          repeat: Infinity,
   143→        }}
   144→      />
   145→    </m.span>
   146→  )
   147→}
   148→
   149→const tokenizeLoadingText = (text: string, locale: string) => {
   150→  if (locale === 'zh') {
   151→    return Array.from(text).map((value, index) => ({
   152→      key: `${index}-${value}`,
   153→      value,
   154→      delay: index * 0.03,
   155→      initial: { opacity: 0, y: 4, filter: 'blur(2px)' },
   156→      animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: 'blur(0px)' },
   157→    }))
   158→  }
   159→
   160→  if (locale === 'ja') {
   161→    return text.split(/\u3000+/).map((value, index, arr) => ({
   162→      key: `${index}-${value}`,
   163→      value: index === arr.length - 1 ? value : `${value}\u3000`,
   164→      delay: index * 0.11,
   165→      initial: { opacity: 0, y: 3, filter: 'blur(2px)' },
   166→      animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: 'blur(0px)' },
   167→    }))
   168→  }
   169→
   170→  return (text.match(/\S+\s*/g) ?? [text]).map((value, index) => ({
   171→    key: `${index}-${value}`,
   172→    value,
   173→    delay: index * 0.06,
   174→    initial: { opacity: 0.15, x: 3, filter: 'blur(2px)' },
   175→    animate: { opacity: 1, x: 0, filter: 'blur(0px)' },
   176→  }))
   177→}
   178→
   179→const AnimatedLoadingText = ({ locale, text }: AnimatedLoadingTextProps) => {
   180→  const tokens = tokenizeLoadingText(text, locale)
   181→
   182→  return (
   183→    <m.span
   184→      animate={{ opacity: [0.9, 1, 0.94] }}
   185→      className="mt-6 block max-w-[32rem] text-center text-sm leading-7 text-neutral-11/80"
   186→      transition={{
   187→        delay: 0.6,
   188→        duration: 2.4,
   189→        ease: 'easeInOut',
   190→        repeat: Infinity,
   191→        repeatType: 'mirror',
   192→      }}
   193→    >
   194→      {tokens.map((token) => (
   195→        <m.span
   196→          animate={token.animate}
   197→          className="inline-block whitespace-pre"
   198→          initial={token.initial}
   199→          key={token.key}
   200→          transition={{
   201→            duration: 0.36,
   202→            ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1],
   203→            delay: token.delay,
   204→          }}
   205→        >
   206→          {token.value}
   207→        </m.span>
   208→      ))}
   209→    </m.span>
   210→  )
   211→}
   212→
   213→export const Loading: Component<LoadingProps> = ({
   214→  loadingText,
   215→  className,
   216→  useDefaultLoadingText = false,
   217→}) => {
   218→  const locale = useLocale()
   219→  const t = useTranslations('common')
   220→  const id = useId()
   221→  const defaultLoadingText = pickLoadingText(t.raw('loading_default'), id)
   222→  const nextLoadingText = useDefaultLoadingText
   223→    ? defaultLoadingText
   224→    : loadingText
   225→  return (
   226→    <div
   227→      data-hide-print
   228→      className={clsxm('my-20 flex flex-col center', className)}
   229→    >
   230→      <InkDropLoadingMark />
   231→      {!!nextLoadingText && (
   232→        <AnimatedLoadingText locale={locale} text={nextLoadingText} />
   233→      )}
   234→    </div>
   235→  )
   236→}
   237→
   238→export const FullPageLoading = () => (
   239→  <Loading useDefaultLoadingText className="h-[calc(100vh-6.5rem-10rem)]" />
   240→)
   241→
```
</details></tool-use>
